name: Applesauce Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream margarine until fluffy.
3. Beat eggs and sugar; add to margarine and blend.
4. Sift together dry ingredients. Add to margarine mixture alternately with applesauce, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla and nuts.
6. Spoon batter into 12 cupcake pans sprayed with vegetable cooking spray or lined with paper baking cups.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes.
Note: Each cupcake contains approximately 177 calories, 1 1/2 starch/bread exchange, 2.7 gm protein, 9.8 gm fat, 19.8 gm carbohydrate, 207.6 mg sodium, 53.3 mg potassium, 1 gm fiber, and 23 mg cholesterol. Source: American Diabetes Association, Family Cookbook Vol 1 (1987). Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in November 1993.
